subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-22 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: While the Persians were occupied with themselves, neglecting their country in the process, we journeyed to the vast expanses of America
subcodes.first_line_orig: هنگامی که ایرانیها بخود مشغول بودند و ایران را بباد میدادند ما در اقالیم واسعهٴ امریک
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @petitions to authorities, @growth of the Cause
